name: Chilean Black-Eyed Peas & Winter Squash
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs winter squash, peeled, cut into 1 chunks (acorn, butternut, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the black-eyed peas overnight.
2. Place all ingredients (except salt and corn) in the crock pot.
3. Stir to mix well.
4. Cook on low for 8 hours.
5. Add corn and salt.
6. Heat through.
7. Serve alone, with cornbread or with a loaf of crusty French bread, or over rice.
